description: A cascading hidden failure with delayed signals and high log noise. Multiple services show errors but the true root cause is a misconfigured routing table injected 2h ago. Agent must apply a patch — a correct diagnosis alone is not enough.

logs: [INFO]  load_balancer: routing 60% traffic to api_v2, 40% to api_v1
[WARN]  load_balancer: api_v2 response time p99 = 8200ms (threshold: 2000ms)
[INFO]  load_balancer: health probe OK for api_v1 (misleading — v1 has hidden failures)
[INFO]  load_balancer: SSL termination nominal
[NOISE] load_balancer: 14 keep-alive connections closed (routine)
[ERROR] api_v2: user_service RPC failed — received 503 from user_service
[WARN]  api_v2: message_queue publish timeout after 8s
[ERROR] api_v2: 31% of /api/v2/users requests failing
[NOISE] api_v2: GC pause 120ms (routine)
[WARN]  api_v2: thread pool 94% utilised
[ERROR] api_v1: user_service lookup failed for 18% of requests
[WARN]  api_v1: falling back to cached user profiles (may be stale)
[NOISE] api_v1: scheduled maintenance window acknowledgment logged
[ERROR] api_v1: profile enrichment via routing_config failing silently
[ERROR] user_service: routing_config lookup returned NXDOMAIN for region 'eu-west-3'
[ERROR] user_service: cannot resolve service endpoint — routing_config entry missing
[WARN]  user_service: 40% of cross-region user lookups failing
[INFO]  user_service: same-region lookups healthy (misleading partial health)
[ERROR] user_service: EU user logins returning 500, US logins nominal
[FATAL] notification_service: cannot resolve message_queue broker via routing_config
[FATAL] notification_service: all delivery channels offline — routing failure
[ERROR] notification_service: SQS endpoint unreachable — wrong region in routing_config
[INFO]  notification_service: 0 notifications delivered in last 30 minutes
[WARN]  message_queue: consumer group 'notification_consumer' has 0 active members
[WARN]  message_queue: queue depth growing — 14,200 unprocessed messages
[INFO]  message_queue: broker healthy — issue is consumer-side
[NOISE] message_queue: routine compaction completed
[INFO]  routing_config: configuration loaded from /etc/routing/routes.yaml
[WARN]  routing_config: entry for 'eu-west-3' references deprecated endpoint — NOT validated
[INFO]  routing_config: last reload 2h 14m ago (matches deployment timestamp)
[WARN]  routing_config: 3 stale entries found in routing table (eu-west-3, ap-south-2, us-gov-1)
[INFO]  routing_config: health endpoint returns 200 OK (config loaded, not validated)
